# For those with an active lifestyle and a desire to be in the heart of it all.

## Redefine luxury in the heart of downtown Miami

Welcome to HUB, where sleek architecture meets modern spaces and thoughtfully curated amenities that seamlessly blend work and leisure.

![HUB Miami](https://i0.wp.com/www.hubmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/HUB-Miami_2-1.jpg?fit=689%2C1020&quality=89&ssl=1)

## UNDER ONE ROOF

Elevate your experience with meticulously designed, high-end lifestyle spaces that exude sophistication. HUB Miami is for those with an active lifestyle and a desire to be in the heart of it all.

### RESIDENCES

306

### STORIES

41

### OFFICE SPACE

245

#### K SQ FT

## Designed to elevate everyday life

![Rooftop Pool](https://i0.wp.com/www.hubmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/HUB-Miami_Residence_Rooftop-Pool_2.jpg?fit=1397%2C830&quality=89&ssl=1)ROOFTOP POOL

HUB Miami is more than just a residence; it’s a gateway to the very best Miami has to offer, with everything you need under one roof.

[Explore THE amenities](https://www.hubmiami.com/the-amenities/)

LIVE / WORK ENVIRONMENT

## LOCATION

HUB Miami’s vibe encapsulates Miami—the weather, the colors, the energy of the nightlife, the food culture, the entertainment, and the outdoor recreation—all right at your doorstep.

**5 min walk** to Brightline

**15 min walk** to MIAMI WORLDCENTER

**20 min drive** TO MIAMI INTERNATIONAL Airport

[NEIGHBORHOOD GUIDE](https://www.hubmiami.com/the-neighborhood#guide)

Elevate your business with meticulously designed, high-end office spaces that exude professionalism and sophistication.

**Office Space** 245,000 SQ FT

**Office Levels** Levels 8-21

**Floorplates** 18k-32k SQ FT

# Video of Hub Miami Residences

[![](https://hubresidences.miami/assets/images/image16.jpg?v=0bb72205)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MkE1E6CHXNI)

### Downtown Miami

## THE LOCATION

Building Address:

[530 NW 1st Ct, Miami, FL 33128, USA](https://www.google.com/maps?ll=25.779141,-80.19688&z=16&t=m&hl=en-US&gl=US&mapclient=embed&q=530+NW+1st+Ct+Miami,+FL+33128+USA)

\- Brickell: 10 minutes’ walk\- Museums & Arena: 3 minutes’ walk\- Train to Orlando: 1 minute walk\- Wynwood: 7 minutes’ drive\- Miami Beaches: 15 minutes’ drive\- Miami Airport: 15 minutes’ drive

### Miami World Center

## The Area

The Miami Worldcenter area offers exceptional advantages. As one of the largest private urban developments in the U.S., it combines residential, commercial, and retail spaces in a prime downtown location. The area benefits from significant infrastructure improvements, high pedestrian traffic, and proximity to key attractions like the Kaseya Center and the Adrienne Arsht Center. With Miami's robust tourism and economic growth, there is strong demand for luxury condos, hotels, and retail spaces. Miami Worldcenter's innovative design, strategic location, and comprehensive amenities promise substantial returns and long-term investment growth, making it a premier choice for investors.

![](https://hubresidences.miami/assets/images/image17.jpg?v=0bb72205)

![](https://hubresidences.miami/assets/images/image04.jpg?v=0bb72205)

### LATest NEWS

## HUB Miami Residences is here!

Take advantage of this great opportunity in furnished luxury condos with Airbnb and great views. Pricing start in the low $500s and you only need 10% to reserve a unit.Updated on: 11/01/2023

## The Architect: ODP Architects

ODP Architecture & Design is a firm headquartered in Hollywood, FL.

Their services include architecture, interior design and planning. This company thrives on achievign what has yet to be done, bringing dreams, instincts and desires into form. Some of the incredible architects the firm has worked with on South Florida projects include Zaha Hadid and Elkus Manfredi.ODP’s dedicated work creates the best residential experiences to shape the future of modern luxury living.

![](https://hubresidences.miami/assets/images/image14.jpg?v=0bb72205)

![](https://hubresidences.miami/assets/images/image15.jpg?v=0bb72205)

## The Interior Designer: One Line Design

One Line Design focuses on the core identity of each space, aiming to tell a story with details and attention to every element, corner, curve and element. With this design vision, they succeed to fulfill the character, purpose and fundamental beauty of the space.The firm’s co-founders bring their collective over 35 years of varied experience. This allows for a fresh approach to their design concepts. One Line approaches each project through the authenticity of their teams’ collective lens.Their most beautiful projects in South Florida include [Yotelpad Miami](https://miamiresidential.com/es/yotelpad/), Bezel Miami, Aloft South Beach, and more.

[Prices](https://hubresidences.miami/#prices) \| [Location](https://hubresidences.miami/#location) \| [Contact Us](https://hubresidences.miami/#contact)

### The Developers: The John Buck Company + FVP

The John Buck Company has been operating since 1981. Their reputation is that of a premier, vertically integrated real estate firm. JBC’s portfolio manages, develops and constructs world-class properties, producing superior returns to their investors. Some of their most renowned buildings include Platform 4611 in Chicago, 2116 Chestnut in Philadelphia, and Porte in Chicago.FVP is the co-developer of Hub Miami. The firm was founded in 2008. The principals of Florida Value Partners have a track record of developing successful opportunistic investment strategies and have managed over $2 billion in financial resources for institutional investors, private investors, pension funds, and private equity firms.

![](https://hubresidences.miami/assets/images/image10.jpg?v=0bb72205)

![](https://hubresidences.miami/assets/images/image11.jpg?v=0bb72205)

### Investing in Miami World Center Urban Oasis

## Why Invest in Miami World Center

Investing in Miami Worldcenter offers unparalleled advantages. As one of the largest private urban developments in the U.S., it features a mix of residential, commercial, and retail spaces in a prime downtown location. The area boasts significant infrastructure improvements, high pedestrian traffic, and proximity to major attractions like the American Airlines Arena and Adrienne Arsht Center. With Miami's strong tourism and economic growth, there's high demand for luxury condos, hotels, and retail spaces. Miami Worldcenter's strategic location, innovative design, and comprehensive amenities promise substantial returns and long-term growth, making it a top investment choice.
